name: ForgeWright MCP
description: ForgeWright + ForgeNexus MCP Configuration for Antigravity

forgewright-workspace.description: ForgeWright project intelligence with workspace isolation

notes.installation: Run 'forgewright-mcp-setup.sh setup' from your project to auto-generate this config
notes.workspace: MCP server auto-detects workspace from cwd (no ${workspaceFolder} needed — Antigravity does not resolve it)
notes.restart: Restart Antigravity after modifying this file
notes.multi_project: One config works for ALL projects with Antigravity
